articles.title: Burkina Faso severs diplomatic ties with France - BBC
articles.description: The West African country's junta accused the former colonial power of undermining its national interests.
articles.content: In January 2025, Burkina Faso, along with two neighbouring military-led states Mali and Niger, officially broke away from the regional West African bloc, Ecowas, to form a new group, The Alliance of … [+16 chars]
